EmailTemplate.description: Applicant acknowledgement when application is submitted.
EmailTemplate.name: App Received
EmailTemplate.subject: Application Received – {!Application__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.markup:
Hello {!Application__c.Applicant__r.Name},

We have received your application for {!Application__c.Program__r.Program_Name__c} on {!Application__c.Submission_Date__c}.

Thank you.
